overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character in ancient Greek assassin attire running along a coastal cliff path. The character moves from a rocky overlook through a narrow stone passage and along a winding dirt trail overlooking the Mediterranean sea with ancient ruins and ships visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal overlook with harbor view

agents.ego_description: running along a dirt path on a rocky cliff overlooking the sea and distant ancient city

entered.detail: large tan rock formation with sparse vegetation
weathered stone outcrop with dry grass
distant coastal settlement with stone buildings and temples
bright blue coastal waters with visible waves
ancient sailing vessels with red and white sails

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rocky coastal overlook with a panoramic view of the Mediterranean sea and a distant ancient harbor city. The character runs along a dirt trail flanked by rocky outcrops, with sailing vessels visible on the water below under a bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage between stone walls

events.description: entering a narrow corridor flanked by tall rock walls

agents.ego_description: running through a narrow rocky passage with stone walls on both sides

entered.detail: tall vertical stone walls casting shadows on the path
tall weathered rock face with sparse greenery
distant trees visible at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow rocky corridor with tall stone walls on both sides that obscure the sea view. The path winds through the enclosed space with scattered olive trees visible ahead at the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal meadow with scattered trees

events.description: exiting the rocky corridor into open coastal landscape
encountering a female NPC walking along the path
dog appears near the rocks on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: running along the coastal path, passing a woman and a dog while approaching the shoreline

notable_agents.action: woman in a blue dress walking along the dirt path
brown dog standing near the rocky outcrop looking toward the character

entered.detail: mature olive tree with thick trunk and green canopy
stone ruins of ancient structures on the coastal hillside
grassy meadow with wildflowers and tall grass
bright blue coastal waters visible again after the passage
ancient sailing vessels visible on the water

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the rocky passage, the scene opens into a sunlit coastal meadow with a large olive tree and views of the sea. The character passes a woman in a blue dress walking the opposite direction and a dog standing near the rocks, with ancient ruins visible on the right hillside.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding coastal trail with panoramic views

events.description: path curves gently to the right as it follows the coastline

agents.ego_description: continuing to run along the winding path as it curves along the hillside

entered.detail: dirt trail curving along the grassy hillside
hazy mountains visible across the sea on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character running along a winding dirt path that curves along the coastal hillside. The olive tree and ruins fade into the distance as the path continues toward the horizon with panoramic views of the sea and distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that transitions from an open overlook through a confined stone passage and back into a wide Mediterranean landscape. It begins with the character running along a dirt trail on a rocky overlook, offering a panoramic view of a distant harbor city and sailing vessels under a bright midday sun. As the character moves forward, the vista disappears as the path enters a narrow rocky corridor with tall stone walls that enclose the space. The scene then opens back up into a sunlit coastal meadow featuring a large olive tree, a woman in a blue dress, and a dog near ancient hillside ruins. Finally, the camera follows the character along a winding dirt path that curves away from the ruins toward the horizon, revealing expansive views of the sea and distant mountains.
